conditions: The service supports delegated administration and trusted access is enabled.
decision_context: Use when separating service administration from management-account access.
exclusions: Delegation does not give unrestricted Organizations mutation permissions.

source_references.locator: Delegated administrator for AWS services that work with Organizations; Permissions granted to delegated administrator accounts
source_references.supported_proposition: Delegation assigns bounded service administration to a member account.

statement: For an AWS service that supports Organizations delegated administration, a registered member account receives service-specific administrative permissions for organization accounts plus defined read-only Organizations permissions.
